$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URL for editor validation and completion.

failOn.description: Lowest finding severity that should fail CI when --ci is used.

baselinePath.description: Optional path to a reviewed AgentReady baseline file.

ignorePaths.description: Path patterns excluded from scanning. Use sparingly for reviewed paths.

ignoreRules.description: Rule ids hidden from active scan results after review.

severityOverrides.description: Per-rule severity overrides for reviewed local policy differences.

maxFileBytes.description: Maximum file size, in bytes, that AgentReady reads during scans.
